capture_metadata.notes: apiyi_cc mixed-risk and citation ordering batch

diagnostics.message: Cold Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Heater Outlet temperature pattern may still be influenced by missing inlet conditions, and the local outlet effect is not yet confirmed.

payload.system:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

content.text: {"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-issue-citation-ordering-warning-artifact-before-snapshot-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","locale":"zh-CN","status":"ok","requires_confirmation":true,"answers":[{"summary":"当前围绕选中的 Warning Heater (heater-6) 及其入口流股 Cold Feed (feed-16) 和出口流股 Heater Outlet (product-16) 生成候选编辑提案。诊断表明 feed-16 缺少流量规格（error），同时 product-16 的出口温度效果因入口条件缺失而未被确认（warning）。求解器当前处于 invalid_parameters 状态。","issues":[{"description":"Cold Feed (feed-16) 缺少流量规格，导致加热器入口条件不完整，求解器无法收敛。","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]},{"description":"Heater Outlet (product-16) 出口温度模式受入口条件缺失影响，局部出口效果尚未确认；该警告预计在补全入口流量规格后可自行消除或需进一步确认。","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-stream-2","snapshot-1"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"为 Cold Feed 补全流量规格占位符","target":"stream:feed-16","rationale":"诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING 指出 feed-16 缺少流量规格。补充 mass_flow_kg_per_h 占位符后，用户可填入实际值以满足加热器入口条件，从而使求解器能够正常求解。出口警告 (HEATER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED) 也极可能在入口条件补全后自行消除。","patch":{"spec_placeholders":[{"field":"mass_flow_kg_per_h","suggested_value":null,"unit":"kg/h","reason":"入口流股缺少流量规格，需用户确认实际质量流量值"}]},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]}],"confidence":0.82,"citations":[{"id":"diag-1","kind":"diagnostic","ref":"diagnostics[0]","label":"STREAM_SPEC_MISSING — Cold Feed 缺少流量规格"},{"id":"diag-2","kind":"diagnostic","ref":"diagnostics[1]","label":"HEATER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED — Heater Outlet 出口效果未确认"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-1","kind":"artifact","ref":"flowsheet_document.streams[0]","label":"Cold Feed (feed-16)"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-2","kind":"artifact","ref":"flowsheet_document.streams[1]","label":"Heater Outlet (product-16)"},{"id":"flowdoc-unit-1","kind":"artifact","ref":"flowsheet_document.units[0]","label":"Warning Heater (heater-6)"},{"id":"snapshot-1","kind":"snapshot","ref":"context.latest_snapshot","label":"求解器快照 — invalid_parameters @ 2026-04-08T00:35:00Z"}]}]}

answers.text: 当前围绕选中的 Warning Heater (heater-6) 及其入口流股 Cold Feed (feed-16) 和出口流股 Heater Outlet (product-16) 生成候选编辑提案。诊断表明 feed-16 缺少流量规格（error），同时 product-16 的出口温度效果因入口条件缺失而未被确认（warning）。求解器当前处于 invalid_parameters 状态。

proposed_actions.title: 为 feed-16 补充缺失规格占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断已明确指出该流股规格不完整，因此更合适的是补局部规格占位，而不是给整图 patch。

issues.message: Cold Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Heater Outlet temperature pattern may still be influenced by missing inlet conditions, and the local outlet effect is not yet confirmed.

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Cold Feed is missing flow rate specification.

citations.label: 诊断 HEATER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED
citations.excerpt: Heater Outlet temperature pattern may still be influenced by missing inlet conditions, and the local outlet effect is not yet confirmed.

response.summary: 当前围绕选中的 Warning Heater (heater-6) 及其入口流股 Cold Feed (feed-16) 和出口流股 Heater Outlet (product-16) 生成候选编辑提案。诊断表明 feed-16 缺少流量规格（error），同时 product-16 的出口温度效果因入口条件缺失而未被确认（warning）。求解器当前处于 invalid_parameters 状态。
